all.en: Welcome aboard, and thank you for choosing our platform as your partner.
all.zh: 歡迎加入，感謝您選擇我們的平台作為合作夥伴。

all.en: This onboarding plan outlines the first ninety days of our engagement.
all.zh: 本導入計畫概述我們合作的前九十天。

all.en: A dedicated implementation manager will guide you through the journey.
all.zh: 專屬導入經理將引導您完成整個流程。

all.en: The kickoff meeting is scheduled for the first week of next month.
all.zh: 啟動會議排定於下個月的第一週。

all.en: During kickoff, we align on goals, timelines, and key stakeholders.
all.zh: 啟動會議中，我們確認目標、時程與關鍵利害關係人。

all.en: Days one through fourteen focus on environment provisioning and access.
all.zh: 第一至十四天聚焦於環境建置與權限開通。

all.en: Our technical team configures your tenant and security baseline.
all.zh: 我方技術團隊將設定您的租戶與安全基準。

all.en: Single sign on integration is typically completed in the second week.
all.zh: 單一登入整合通常於第二週完成。

all.en: Data migration planning begins during the first sprint of the project.
all.zh: 資料移轉規劃於專案首個衝刺期間開始。

all.en: Source systems and field mappings are validated by both teams.
all.zh: 雙方團隊將驗證來源系統與欄位對應。

all.en: Training sessions are scheduled for administrators and end users.
all.zh: 訓練課程為管理員與終端使用者排定。

all.en: Administrator training takes place in week three of the program.
all.zh: 管理員訓練於計畫第三週進行。

all.en: End user training is rolled out in cohorts during weeks four and five.
all.zh: 終端使用者訓練於第四與第五週分批推行。

all.en: A user acceptance testing phase follows immediately after training.
all.zh: 使用者驗收測試階段於訓練後立即展開。

all.en: Test scripts cover the most common business workflows in detail.
all.zh: 測試腳本詳細涵蓋最常見的業務工作流程。

all.en: Issues identified during testing are tracked and resolved promptly.
all.zh: 測試期間發現的問題均追蹤並迅速解決。

all.en: Go live readiness is reviewed in a formal checkpoint meeting.
all.zh: 上線就緒度於正式檢核會議中審視。

all.en: Production cutover typically occurs during a weekend maintenance window.
all.zh: 正式環境切換通常於週末維護時段進行。

all.en: Hypercare support is provided for two weeks following go live.
all.zh: 上線後將提供兩週的密集支援。

all.en: A dedicated chat channel offers rapid response during hypercare.
all.zh: 密集支援期間有專屬聊天頻道提供快速回應。

all.en: Adoption metrics are reviewed in a thirty day business review.
all.zh: 採用指標於三十天業務檢討會中審視。

all.en: Customer success transitions ownership at the ninety day milestone.
all.zh: 客戶成功團隊於九十天里程碑接手後續關係。

all.en: Ongoing reviews ensure continuous value and adoption growth.
all.zh: 持續性檢討確保價值延續與採用率提升。

all.en: We are committed to making your launch smooth and successful.
all.zh: 我們致力於讓您的上線順暢且成功。

all.en: Executive sponsors meet quarterly to review strategic alignment and roadmap.
all.zh: 高階主管贊助者每季開會檢視策略一致性與藍圖。

all.en: A success plan documents shared objectives and measurable outcomes.
all.zh: 成功計畫記載共同目標與可衡量的成果。

all.en: Knowledge base articles are curated to address frequent administrator questions.
all.zh: 知識庫文章經精選以回應管理員常見問題。

all.en: Feature adoption dashboards highlight underutilized modules for follow up.
all.zh: 功能採用儀表板凸顯利用率不足的模組以利追蹤。

all.en: Health scores combine usage, sentiment, and support ticket trends.
all.zh: 健康分數結合使用率、滿意度與支援單趨勢。

all.en: Renewal conversations begin no later than ninety days before contract expiry.
all.zh: 續約對話於合約到期前九十天內展開。

all.en: Expansion opportunities surface through structured business value workshops.
all.zh: 擴展機會透過結構化的商業價值工作坊浮現。

all.en: Customer advisory board invitations recognize highly engaged accounts.
all.zh: 客戶顧問委員會的邀請是對高參與度客戶的肯定。

all.en: Reference programs offer marketing benefits in exchange for case studies.
all.zh: 推薦計畫以行銷利益換取客戶案例分享。

all.en: Annual partnership reviews celebrate milestones and set the next year priorities.
all.zh: 年度合作檢討慶祝里程碑並設定來年的優先事項。
